user_input: My name is Sharad Harjai. I was born on 24/01/1986 at 06:32 am in Rohtak, Haryana. I want to know if last year I had any situation to get into a legal case

final.summary: There was a moderate but not extreme probability of legal/contractual tensions last year, especially around disputes over money, property, or agreements, but the chart suggests more of a “stressful negotiation / near‑legal” phase rather than a clear, inevitable court case.
